title: Rust EDHOC state structs missing zeroize
description: In edhoc.rs, InitiatorState (lines 153-163) and ResponderState (lines 451-476) contain PRK secrets (prk_2e, prk_3e2m, prk_4e3m) but do not derive Zeroize. These PRKs are used to derive OSCORE keys. Add Zeroize derive with zeroize(drop). Affects confidentiality.
